description: Hybrid ACP integration: Village core remains custom, ACP provides interface layer for ecosystem compatibility. Enables Village to work with ACP-compatible editors (Zed, JetBrains) and agents (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, etc.) while maintaining its laser-focused coordination core.
title: ACP Integration Epic

close_reason: Completed using official ACP SDK. VillageACPAgent extends acp.Agent base class.
description:
Implement JSON-RPC 2.0 server in village/acp/server.py with method routing, error handling, and request/response serialization. Must support async handlers and follow ACP protocol specification.

Deliverables:
- village/acp/server.py with ACPServer class
- JSON-RPC 2.0 compliant request/response handling
- Method registry with async handlers
- Error handling with proper error codes
- Support for notifications (no response expected)

Acceptance Criteria:
- Server handles initialize method correctly
- Server routes methods to registered handlers
- Server returns proper JSON-RPC error responses
- Server supports concurrent requests
- Unit tests pass with >90% coverage
title: ACP Server Infrastructure

close_reason:
Completed CLI Commands implementation with all deliverables:

✅ Implemented commands:
- village acp --server start [--host HOST] [--port PORT]
- village acp --server stop
- village acp --server status
- village acp --client list
- village acp --client spawn <agent-name>
- village acp --client test <agent-name>

✅ Features:
- Flag-based structure (--server/--client) instead of nested groups
- All commands support --json flag for structured output
- Server start: Launches Village as ACP agent (async)
- Server stop: Placeholder for future daemon mode
- Server status: Shows ACP configuration and capabilities
- Client list: Lists configured ACP agents from .village/config
- Client spawn: Spawns external ACP agent process
- Client test: Tests connection to external agent

✅ Testing:
- All commands manually tested
- Configuration parsing verified
- JSON output verified

close_reason: Bridge Core complete. ACPBridge class connects ACP protocol to Village core operations.
description:
Implement bridge in village/acp/bridge.py that translates ACP protocol to Village core operations. Map ACP sessions to Village tasks, handle state transitions, and bridge event notifications.

Deliverables:
- village/acp/bridge.py with ACPBridge class
- Session-to-task mapping logic
- State transition bridging
- Event-to-notification conversion
- Error translation (Village errors → ACP errors)
- Integration with Village core modules

Acceptance Criteria:
- Bridge creates Village task for ACP session/new
- Bridge executes Village resume for ACP session/prompt
- Bridge converts Village events to ACP notifications
- Bridge validates ACP params against Village constraints
- Bridge handles Village errors gracefully
- Integration tests with mock Village core
title: ACP Bridge Core

description:
Implement ACP session methods: initialize, session/new, session/load, session/prompt, session/cancel. Bridge to Village's task state machine and resume logic.

Deliverables:
- ACPBridge.handle_initialize()
- ACPBridge.handle_session_new()
- ACPBridge.handle_session_load()
- ACPBridge.handle_session_prompt()
- ACPBridge.handle_session_cancel()
- Integration with TaskStateMachine

Acceptance Criteria:
- initialize returns Village capabilities
- session/new creates Village task in QUEUED state
- session/load resumes existing task
- session/prompt executes Village resume
- session/cancel transitions task to PAUSED
- All methods return ACP-compliant responses
- Unit tests with mock state machine
title: Session Lifecycle Methods
